notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: AnalyticsInstance lifecycle exposes CREATING, ACTIVE, UPDATING, DELETING, FAILED, INACTIVE, and DELETED. Repo-authored controller success is ACTIVE or INACTIVE, requeue covers CREATING and UPDATING, FAILED is terminal without requeue, and delete confirmation follows DELETING to DELETED or NotFound.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateAnalyticsInstanceDetails now carries update_channel, domain_id, admin_user, and feature_bundle. AnalyticsInstance responses now project update_channel, system_tags, feature_bundle, and domain_id, while AnalyticsInstanceSummary projects system_tags but does not echo update_channel, feature_bundle, or domain_id.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: UpdateAnalyticsInstanceDetails exposes description, email_notification, license_type, freeform_tags, defined_tags, and update_channel as in-place update fields. Auxiliary mutators ChangeAnalyticsInstanceCompartment, ChangeAnalyticsInstanceNetworkEndpoint, ScaleAnalyticsInstance, SetFeatureBundle, and SetKmsKey own the remaining mutable provider surface such as compartment_id, network_endpoint_details.*, capacity.capacity_value, feature_bundle, and kms_key_id.

Repo-authored runtime contract stays narrower than the imported provider surface: only description, emailNotification, licenseType, freeformTags, definedTags, and updateChannel reconcile in place. DomainId is a create-time input that remains status-projected only, while AdminUser and IdcsAccessToken are create-time inputs OCI does not echo back after create.

CreateAnalyticsInstance and DeleteAnalyticsInstance return opc-work-request-id headers, while UpdateAnalyticsInstance returns only the resource body. The reviewed generatedruntime client records request and work-request breadcrumbs when present and relies on lifecycle projection plus confirm-delete rereads rather than service-local work-request polling.

ListAnalyticsInstancesRequest filters by compartmentId, name, capacityType, featureSet, and lifecycleState and returns Items []AnalyticsInstanceSummary. Safe reusable matching is exact compartment_id plus name plus feature_set plus capacity_type, restricted to reusable ACTIVE, CREATING, UPDATING, or INACTIVE candidates; duplicate exact matches fail instead of guessing.
